name: Megatron
oracle_text:
Alt-Mode (Galvatron) — {2}: Until your next turn, ~'s base power and toughness become 7/7 and it gains trample and haste. Activate only as a sorcery.
Whenever you sacrifice an Energon token, target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn.
flavor_text: The era of peace is over; the age of Unicron has begun.

validation_errors: Type line is 47 characters, exceeding the 45-char guideline

design_notes: Megatron serves as the flagship Mythic for the Decepticon faction. His design uses 'Alt-Mode' to represent his narrative mutation into Galvatron, providing a massive 7/7 haste/trample threat that creates immediate tension for opponents. To support the 'Decepticon Tyranny' archetype (WB/BR), I gave him an Energon synergy that converts fuel resources into powerful -3/-3 removal, allowing him to control the board through attrition and mechanical decay. The type line was carefully drafted to stay under the 45-character limit while maintaining all necessary supertypes.
